message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-674-provide-sql-server-scaler",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Provide SQL Server scaler",
+    "description": "Provide SQL Server scaler. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\nProvide SQL Server scaler that is able to work with SQL Server & Azure SQL Database."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Provide SQL Server scaler",
+        "description": "This PR adds a built-in scaler that uses a Microsoft SQL Server (MSSQL) database as the event source. It's very similar to both the existing mysql and postgresql scalers and is intended to work with both self-hosted SQL Server databases and SQL Server databases hosted in managed clouds.\n\nDocumentation PR: https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs/pull/367\n\nThere is still more work to do on this PR, which is tracked in the checklist below. This also includes end-to-end testing. However, I wanted to\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Provide SQL Server scaler\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds a built-in scaler that uses a Microsoft SQL Server (MSSQL) database as the event source. It's very similar to both the existing mysql and postgresql scalers and is intended to work with both self-hosted SQL Server databases and SQL Server databases hosted in managed clouds.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
